title: Linque Named Winner of the 4th Edition of the IC Taiwan Grand Challenge
excerpt: Linque has been named a winner of the 4th Batch of the IC Taiwan Grand Challenge (ICTGC), a premier global innovation competition focused on accelerating breakthrough semiconductor and deep technology solutions organized by Taiwan's National Science and Technology Council (NSTC).

title: Linque Closes Series A Funding Round to Accelerate Silicon Photonics Development
excerpt: Linque Technologies has successfully closed its Series A funding round, securing capital to expand its silicon photonics research team and accelerate the path to commercial deployment of its programmable photonic integrated circuits.

title: Linque Announces Strategic Partnership with Leading Hyperscaler for AI Workload Optimization
excerpt: Linque has entered a strategic collaboration agreement with a major cloud infrastructure provider to co-develop photonic accelerator solutions targeting large-scale AI inference and training workloads.

title: Linque Demonstrates First Working Prototype of Photonic Matrix Processor
excerpt: The Linque engineering team has successfully demonstrated the first working prototype of its photonic matrix processor, achieving a tenfold reduction in energy per operation compared to conventional digital accelerators at equivalent throughput.
